title: gratiola officinalis
intro: Gratiola officinalis, also known as bitter golden glad or bugle, is a perennial herb native to North America, belonging to the Plantaginaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its bitter and astringent properties, making it useful for digestive issues and as a natural anti-inflammatory. The health benefits of Gratiola officinalis include its ability to improve digestion, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Gratiola officinalis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
